TEXT.source: Atayal Wikipedia, article: qalaqalang_Kbabun_碼崙部落ng_Sqbu’Sqbux_長嶺部落
TEXT.citation: qalaqalang_Kbabun_碼崙部落ng_Sqbu’Sqbux_長嶺部落. (2025, May 05). In Wikipedia [Atayal]. https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qalaqalang_Kbabun_碼崙部落ng_Sqbu’Sqbux_長嶺部落
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_qalaqalang_Kbabun_碼崙部落ng_Sqbu’Sqbux_長嶺部落, title = qalaqalang_Kbabun_碼崙部落ng_Sqbu’Sqbux_長嶺部落, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/qalaqalang_Kbabun_碼崙部落ng_Sqbu’Sqbux_長嶺部落} }

S.FORM: == mwani misuw qalang ru cyux te inu 部落概況與位置 == qalang kbanun hiya qani ga, ssaying maki qszyap na lluyung minus, knbawiq nya ga, ski kmwah magan kbhul mspat pgan, haring ryax na hlangan Ipun ga mnwah tqalang naki cqani, kmut khoniq cyunga ru pslyan khoniq qalang naha hani, knian na aki kisya cyunga, blaq calay qaxan naha, mehong nya lga uka sexu ini swan naha kmut khoniq ro ng_yut photaw qabax pintyawun naha la, piyux cquliq (thelu ru kahat), musa naha la, musa Hiran ini ga hogan la, mwani lga nanaq pthay ita Tayal maki cqani mqyanux mlahang zhiyal ta nanaq. . sinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 alang Kbanun qani hiya ga, sraral ga son ta Mnoyan, knahul ta qalang Mnoyan mnwah cqani, ro ryax na kinlhangan na Gipun ga iyugun naha lalu son maha Kbanun, imi na cinllwan nya ga, cyan maki qutux pinqiyon, nanu ga sraral kian qani ga, maki piyux panan, penan ga qutux mehong nya lga, bnheci ta si soy Kbanun la, baha hmswa iugun qoyeq qani, ini ta baqiy uzi, siga lungun ta nanaq cwa maha kya. 部落以前舊為Mnoyan, Kbanun, Kbanun, . pinqzyuwan qalang 部落遷徙 Pinsbkan -Quri sqabu -沿著Turuy kacing 山背下切-經Hbun qyus -gong Matang -hbun Talah (又稱sgmi)- .一部分人前往Mnoyan -Skikun -Kbanun

== mwani misuw qalang ru cyux te inu 部落概況與位置 == qalang kbanun hiya qani ga, ssaying maki qszyap na lluyung minus, knbawiq nya ga, ski kmwah magan kbhul mspat pgan, haring ryax na hlangan Ipun ga mnwah tqalang naki cqani, kmut khoniq cyunga ru pslyan khoniq qalang naha hani, knian na aki kisya cyunga, blaq calay qaxan naha, mehong nya lga uka sexu ini swan naha kmut khoniq ro ng_yut photaw qabax pintyawun naha la, piyux cquliq (thelu ru kahat), musa naha la, musa Hiran ini ga hogan la, mwani lga nanaq pthay ita Tayal maki cqani mqyanux mlahang zhiyal ta nanaq. . sinllwan lalu qalang 地名由來 alang Kbanun qani hiya ga, sraral ga son ta Mnoyan, knahul ta qalang Mnoyan mnwah cqani, ro ryax na kinlhangan na Gipun ga iyugun naha lalu son maha Kbanun, imi na cinllwan nya ga, cyan maki qutux pinqiyon, nanu ga sraral kian qani ga, maki piyux panan, penan ga qutux mehong nya lga, bnheci ta si soy Kbanun la, baha hmswa iugun qoyeq qani, ini ta baqiy uzi, siga lungun ta nanaq cwa maha kya. 部落以前舊為Mnoyan, Kbanun, Kbanun, . pinqzyuwan qalang 部落遷徙 Pinsbkan -Quri sqabu -沿著Turuy kacing 山背下切-經Hbun qyus -gong Matang -hbun Talah (又稱sgmi)- .一部分人前往Mnoyan -Skikun -Kbanun
S.PHON: == mwani mis~ɕuw qalaŋ ru ʦ~ʨjux te inu ******* == qalaŋ kβanun ħija qani ɣa, s~ɕs~ɕajiŋ maki qs~ɕzjap na llujuŋ minus~ɕ, knβawiq nja ɣa, s~ɕki kmwaħ maɣan kβħul ms~ɕpat pɣan, ħariŋ rjax na ħlaŋan ipun ɣa mnwaħ tqalaŋ naki ʦ~ʨqani, kmut kħoniq ʦ~ʨjuŋa ru ps~ɕljan kħoniq qalaŋ naħa ħani, knian na aki kis~ɕja ʦ~ʨjuŋa, βlaq ʦ~ʨalaj qaxan naħa, meħoŋ nja lɣa uka s~ɕexu ini s~ɕwan naħa kmut kħoniq ro ŋəjut pħotaw qaβax pintjawun naħa la, pijux ʦ~ʨquliq (tħelu ru kaħat), mus~ɕa naħa la, mus~ɕa ħiran ini ɣa ħoɣan la, mwani lɣa nanaq ptħaj ita tajal maki ʦ~ʨqani mqjanux mlaħaŋ zħijal ta nanaq. . s~ɕinllwan lalu qalaŋ **** alaŋ kβanun qani ħija ɣa, s~ɕraral ɣa s~ɕon ta mnojan, knaħul ta qalaŋ mnojan mnwaħ ʦ~ʨqani, ro rjax na kinlħaŋan na ɣipun ɣa ijuɣun naħa lalu s~ɕon maħa kβanun, imi na ʦ~ʨinllwan nja ɣa, ʦ~ʨjan maki qutux pinqijon, nanu ɣa s~ɕraral kian qani ɣa, maki pijux panan, penan ɣa qutux meħoŋ nja lɣa, βnħeʦ~ʨi ta s~ɕi s~ɕoj kβanun la, βaħa ħms~ɕwa iuɣun qojeq qani, ini ta βaqij uzi, s~ɕiɣa luŋun ta nanaq ʦ~ʨwa maħa kja. ******mnojan, kβanun, kβanun, . pinqzjuwan qalaŋ **** pins~ɕβkan -quri s~ɕqaβu -**turuj kaʦ~ʨiŋ ****-*ħβun qjus~ɕ -ɣoŋ mataŋ -ħβun talaħ (**s~ɕɣmi)- .******mnojan -s~ɕkikun -kβanun
